label: Battery health for Ecowitt + eWeLink devices
items: The battery pip + decay sparkline + days-remaining estimate now work on Ecowitt soil sensors and eWeLink water valves — not just Custom HTTP. Ecowitt's soilbattN field is auto-detected (0-5 level scale vs 0-100 percent). eWeLink reads params.battery / battPercentage / batteryPercentage from the state response. Pip lights up from the next sync; the sparkline populates as new readings arrive.

Refactor under the hood: the shared insertReading helper now does the battery dual-write to devices.battery_percent + devices.battery_reported_at in one place, so any future provider just needs to put battery in the reading data and the rest happens for free.
